tickers.name: Metaplanet Inc.
tickers.notes: Frankfurt listing. NOTE: Yahoo uses .F suffix for Frankfurt, NOT .DE (DN3.DE returns 404). Same company as TYO:3350 and MTPLF.

tickers.name: Metaplanet Inc.
tickers.notes: US OTC ticker for Metaplanet. Same company as TYO:3350 and DN3.F. Yahoo has ~400 bars — cleanest history of the three listings.

yahoo_notes.reliability: Tested 18 requests across 6 tickers, 0 failures, 0 rate-limits. User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 header sufficient; no crumb/cookie needed from this network.
yahoo_notes.suffix_convention: Yahoo uses .HK (HKEX), .T (Tokyo), .F (Frankfurt/XETRA), no suffix (US). DN3.DE does NOT exist — use DN3.F.
